text:
Dated [date]

Notice

You [applicant name] may be sent to prison for contempt of court if you break the promise that have been given to the court

Statement of understanding

I understand the undertakings that I have given, and that if I break any of my promises to the court I may be sent to prison for contempt of court

[applicant name] [signed on [his] / [her] behalf by [applicant solicitor name]]

Notice

You [respondent name] may be sent to prison for contempt of court if you break the promise that have been given to the court

Statement of understanding

I understand the undertakings that I have given, and that if I break any of my promises to the court I may be sent to prison for contempt of court

[respondent name] [signed on [his] / [her] behalf by [respondent solicitor name]]

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the High Court of Justice
metadata.parent_document: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
